question_text: Which of the following is the correct definition of density?

options.label: A
options.text: The mass of a substance divided by its volume

options.label: B
options.text: The volume of a substance divided by its mass

options.label: C
options.text: The weight of a substance multiplied by its volume

options.label: D
options.text: The temperature of a substance divided by its mass

explanation: Density is defined as mass per unit volume. This is a key definition in Year 8 physics and is used to compare how tightly packed the particles are in different materials.
